name: Lumina Store
description: Lumina Store is a curated marketplace of premium design objects, furniture, and lighting. SEO-friendly, lightning fast, and beautifully crafted.

hero.headline: Objects made to be lived with, not just looked at.
hero.subhead: A small, opinionated catalogue of lighting, seating and storage — each piece chosen for how it ages, not how it photographs.

seo.defaultTitle: Lumina Store — Handmade Khurja ceramics & design objects
seo.description: Handmade, hand-painted Khurja ceramics and curated design objects. Each piece is shaped and painted by hand by artisans in Khurja, Uttar Pradesh — no two are ever alike.
